title: Craftable Vines
description: Just duplicate the vanilla vines using bone meal in the crafting menu instead of doing manually the work!
body:
To make life easier, this mod adds 3 new recipes for the different types of vines. 
Now, when combined with bone meal, the vines will be doubled!

![Crafting Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/119b9b5a96a2fee6763f0164c122a14c1995cc61.png)

Supports:
- Vines
- Twisting vines
- Weeping vines

That's it! 
Have fun!
